query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name AS 合伙人姓名,
  c.name AS 城市,
  p.accountName AS 开户名,
  p.bankName AS 开户行,
  p.accountNumber AS 账号
FROM partners p
JOIN partner_cities pc ON p.id = pc.partnerId
JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE p.bankName IS NOT NULL OR p.accountNumber IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY c.name;

  p.name AS 合伙人姓名,
  c.name AS 城市,
  p.accountName AS 开户名,
  p.bankName AS 开户行,
  p.accountNumber AS 账号
FROM partners p
JOIN partner_cities pc ON p.id = pc.partnerId
JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE p.bankName IS NOT NULL OR p.accountNumber IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY c.name;
